

ANGUIANO-CONSTANTE, M.A., DEAN, E., STARBUCK, T., RODRÍGUEZ, A. &
MUNGUÍA-LINO, G. (2021) [Diversity, species richness distribution and
centers of endemism of lycianthes (capsiceae, solanaceae) in
mexico](https://doi.org/10.11646/phytotaxa.514.1.3). *Phytotaxa*,
**514**, 39--60.

Bartoli, F., Iocchi, M. & Lucchese, F. (2021) [Spatial phylogenetic
diversity of pteridophytes in latium (central italy): A tool for
conservation planning at regional
scale](https://doi.org/10.7320/FlMedit31SI.297). *Flora Mediterranea*,
**31 Special Issue**, 297--315.

Bharti, D.K., Edgecombe, G.D., Karanth, K.P. & Joshi, J. (2021) [Spatial
patterns of phylogenetic diversity and endemism in the western ghats,
india: A case study using ancient predatory
arthropods](https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.8119). *Ecology and Evolution*,
**11**, 16499--16513.

Camacho, G.P., Loss, A.C., Fisher, B.L. & Blaimer, B.B. (2021) [Spatial
phylogenomics of acrobat ants in madagascar---mountains function as
cradles for recent diversity and
endemism](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.14107). *Journal of Biogeography*,
**48**, 1706--1719.

Cheikh Albassatneh, M., Escudero, M., Monnet, A., Arroyo, J., Bacchetta,
G., Bagnoli, F., Dimopoulos, P., Hampe, A., Leriche, A., Médail, F.,
Nikolic, T., Ponger, L., Vendramin, G.G. & Fady, B. (2021) [Spatial
patterns of genus‐level phylogenetic endemism in the tree flora of
mediterranean europe](https://doi.org/10.1111/ddi.13241). *Diversity and
Distributions*, **27**, 913--928.

Contreras-Medina, R., García-Martínez, A.I., Ramírez-Martínez, J.C.,
Espinosa, D., Balam-Narváez, R. & Luna-Vega, I. (2021) [Biogeographic
analysis of ferns and lycophytes in oaxaca: A mexican beta-diverse
area](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.2844). *Botanical Sciences*,
**100**, 204--222.

Earl, C., Belitz, M.W., Laffan, S.W., Barve, V., Barve, N., Soltis,
D.E., Allen, J.M., Soltis, P.S., Mishler, B.D., Kawahara, A.Y. &
Guralnick, R. (2021) [Spatial phylogenetics of butterflies in relation
to environmental drivers and angiosperm diversity across north
america](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.isci.2021.102239). *iScience*,
**24**, 102239.

Flores-Tolentino, M., Beltrán-Rodríguez, L., Morales-Linares, J.,
Ramírez Rodríguez, J.R., Ibarra-Manríquez, G., Dorado, Ó. & Villaseñor,
J.L. (2021) [Biogeographic regionalization by spatial and environmental
components: Numerical
proposal](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0253152). *PLOS ONE*,
**16**, 0253152.

Furtado, S.G. & Menini Neto, L. (2021) [What is the role of topographic
heterogeneity and climate on the distribution and conservation of
vascular epiphytes in the brazilian atlantic
forest?](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10531-021-02150-6) *Biodiversity and
Conservation*, **30**, 1415--1431.

Garcia-Rodriguez, A., Luna-Vega, I., Yáñez-Ordóñez, O.,
Ramírez-Martínez, J.C., Espinosa, D. & Contreras-Medina, R. (2021)
[Patrones de distribución de las Abejas1 del bosque mesófilo de montaña
de la sierra madre oriental,
méxico](https://doi.org/10.3958/059.046.0425). *Southwestern
Entomologist*, **46**.

Gonzalez-Orozco, C. (2021) [Regiones biogeográficas del género cinchona
l. (Rubiaceae-
cinchoneae)](https://doi.org/10.47374/novcol.2021.v16.1987). *Revista
Novedades Colombianas*, **16**, 135--156.

GONZÁLEZ-OROZCO, C.E. (2021) [Biogeographical regionalisation of
colombia: A revised area
taxonomy](https://doi.org/10.11646/phytotaxa.484.3.1). *Phytotaxa*,
**484**.

González‐Orozco, C.E., Sosa, C.C., Thornhill, A.H. & Laffan, S.W. (2021)
[Phylogenetic diversity and conservation of crop wild relatives in
colombia](https://doi.org/10.1111/eva.13295). *Evolutionary
Applications*, **14**, 2603--2617.

Hammer, T.A., Renton, M., Mucina, L. & Thiele, K.R. (2021) [Arid
australia as a source of plant diversity: The origin and climatic
evolution of ptilotus (amaranthaceae)](https://doi.org/10.1071/sb21012).
*Australian Systematic Botany*, **34**, 570--586.

Hao, T., Elith, J., Guillera-Arroita, G., Lahoz-Monfort, J.J. & May,
T.W. (2021) [Enhancing repository fungal data for biogeographic
analyses](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.funeco.2021.101097). *Fungal
Ecology*, **53**, 101097.

Kong, H., Condamine, F.L., Yang, L., Harris, A.J., Feng, C., Wen, F. &
Kang, M. (2021) [Phylogenomic and macroevolutionary evidence for an
explosive radiation of a plant genus in the
miocene](https://doi.org/10.1093/sysbio/syab068). *Systematic Biology*,
**71**, 589--609.

Kougioumoutzis, K., Kokkoris, I., Panitsa, M., Kallimanis, A., Strid, A.
& Dimopoulos, P. (2021) [Plant endemism centres and biodiversity
hotspots in greece](https://doi.org/10.3390/biology10020072). *Biology*,
**10**, 72.

Murali, G., Gumbs, R., Meiri, S. & Roll, U. (2021) [Global determinants
and conservation of evolutionary and geographic rarity in land
vertebrates](https://doi.org/10.1126/sciadv.abe5582). *Science
Advances*, **7**.

Ortiz-Brunel, J.P., Munguía-Lino, G., Castro-Castro, A. & Rodríguez, A.
(2021) [Biogeographic analysis of the american genus echeandia
(agavoideae:
asparagaceae)](https://doi.org/10.22201/ib.20078706e.2021.92.3739).
*Revista Mexicana de Biodiversidad*, **92**, 923739.

Paz, A., Brown, J.L., Cordeiro, C.L.O., Aguirre‐Santoro, J., Assis, C.,
Amaro, R.C., Raposo do Amaral, F., Bochorny, T., Bacci, L.F., Caddah,
M.K., d'Horta, F., Kaehler, M., Lyra, M., Grohmann, C.H., Reginato, M.,
Silva‐Brandão, K.L., Freitas, A.V.L., Goldenberg, R., Lohmann, L.G.,
Michelangeli, F.A., Miyaki, C., Rodrigues, M.T., Silva, T.S. & Carnaval,
A.C. (2021) [Environmental correlates of taxonomic and phylogenetic
diversity in the atlantic forest](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.14083).
*Journal of Biogeography*, **48**, 1377--1391.

Pinedo‐Escatel, J.A., Aragón‐Parada, J., Dietrich, C.H., Moya‐Raygoza,
G., Zahniser, J.N. & Portillo, L. (2021) [Biogeographical evaluation and
conservation assessment of arboreal leafhoppers in the mexican
transition zone biodiversity
hotspot](https://doi.org/10.1111/ddi.13254). *Diversity and
Distributions*, **27**, 1051--1065.

Suissa, J.S., Sundue, M.A. & Testo, W.L. (2021) [Mountains, climate and
niche heterogeneity explain global patterns of fern
diversity](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.14076). *Journal of
Biogeography*, **48**, 1296--1308.

Xue, T., Gadagkar, S.R., Albright, T.P., Yang, X., Li, J., Xia, C., Wu,
J. & Yu, S. (2021) [Prioritizing conservation of biodiversity in an
alpine region: Distribution pattern and conservation status of seed
plants in the qinghai-tibetan
plateau](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.gecco.2021.e01885). *Global Ecology
and Conservation*, **32**, 01885.

Yang, X., Liu, B., Bussmann, R.W., Guan, X., Xu, W., Xue, T., Xia, C.,
Li, J., Jiang, H., Wu, L. & Yu, S. (2021) [Integrated plant diversity
hotspots and long-term stable conservation strategies in the unique
karst area of southern china under global climate
change](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.foreco.2021.119540). *Forest Ecology
and Management*, **498**, 119540.

Zhang, Y., Chen, J. & Sun, H. (2021) [Alpine speciation and
morphological innovations: Revelations from a species-rich genus in the
northern hemisphere](https://doi.org/10.1093/aobpla/plab018). *AoB
PLANTS*, **13**.

Zhang, Y., Qian, L., Spalink, D., Sun, L., Chen, J. & Sun, H. (2021)
[Spatial phylogenetics of two topographic extremes of the hengduan
mountains in southwestern china and its implications for biodiversity
conservation](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.pld.2020.09.001). *Plant
Diversity*, **43**, 181--191.

Zhu, Z., Harris, A., Nizamani, M.M., Thornhill, A.H., Scherson, R.A. &
Wang, H. (2021) [Spatial phylogenetics of the native woody plant species
in hainan, china](https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.7180). *Ecology and
Evolution*, **11**, 2100--2109.
